title: Verify force-with-lease retry mechanism (T18)
description: Execute T18 test case to verify force-with-lease retry on non-fast-forward push. Run `@kody rerun --from build` on an issue with a prior pushed branch, then check logs for: (1) fast-forward success (normal push), or (2) non-fast-forward rejection with 'Push rejected (non-fast-forward), retrying with --force-with-lease' message. Either outcome validates the retry mechanism exists.
existing_patterns: .claude/commands/kody-test-suite.md:544-552 - T18 test case definition with exact verification steps
.kody/runs/575.jsonl - prior run demonstrating force-with-lease push attempt
